# Support

## Getting Help

| Type of Question | Where to Ask |
|-----------------|--------------|
| Stuck on an assignment | [Open a support issue](../../issues/new?template=support.yml) |
| Grade dispute | [Open a dispute issue](../../issues/new?template=wrong-tier.yml) |
| Bug in the platform | [Report a bug](../../issues/new?template=report-bug.yml) |
| Feature suggestion | [Open a Discussion](../../discussions) |
| Suggest a video | [Suggest a video](../../issues/new?template=suggest-video.yml) |
| Peer help / study groups | Tag `study-group` on any issue |

## Response Times

| Priority | Target Response |
|----------|----------------|
| 🔴 Blocked (can't submit) | < 24 hours |
| 🟡 Stuck on concept | < 48 hours |
| 🟢 General question | < 5 business days |

Community members often answer faster — especially in the `help-wanted` label queue!

## Self-Help Resources

Before opening an issue, try:

1. **Re-read the stage README** — most questions are answered there
2. **Check the error message carefully** — the grader always includes a hint
3. **Search existing issues** — your question may already be answered
4. **Look at the resources section** in the stage `meta.yaml`

## Mentorship

If you've been inactive for 5+ days, you may be automatically matched with a
certified graduate mentor. You can also request mentorship by commenting
`/mentor` on your enrollment issue.

## Community

We're a small, friendly community of developers learning in public.
Please follow our [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
